chapter_title.en: Chapter on Cases in Which Marriage is Invalidated

text: 4497 - وَ رَوَى عَبْدُ اَلْحَمِيدِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "تُرَدُّ اَلْعَمْيَاءُ وَ اَلْبَرْصَاءُ وَ اَلْجَذْمَاءُ وَ اَلْعَرْجَاءُ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4497 - Abd al-Hamid narrated from Muhammad ibn Muslim, who said:
Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) said: "A blind woman, a woman with vitiligo, a woman with leprosy, and a lame woman can be returned (marriage contract can be annulled due to these conditions)."
